description: Use this API to purge an OPF period reserve constraint record and its association with participating reserve units from the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.0.0. ierr = purge_opf_perrsv(rsvid)

parameters.name: rsvid
parameters.description: A valid period reserve identifier (1 through 15). (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
